articles.title: Former CIA chief reveals early knowledge of Israeli attack plans
articles.summary: Former CIA chief David Petraeus says the US attacked Iran to scuttle its ability to defend itself against Israel.

articles.title: Iran’s Space Research Centre severely damaged in strikes
articles.summary: Video has revealed the Iranian Space Research Centre in Tehran has suffered significant damage from Israeli-US strikes.

articles.title: Iran war live: Trump urges allies to keep Hormuz open amid Gulf attacks
articles.summary: US President Donald Trump says allies who rely on Gulf oil must help keep the Strait of Hormuz open.

articles.title: Pakistan strikes Afghan base after its president warns ‘red line’ crossed
articles.summary: Islamabad hits Kandahar facility after Taliban drones strike civilian areas and military sites as conflict intensifies.

articles.title: Brazil’s jailed ex-president Bolsonaro hospitalised with lung infection
articles.summary: Far-right leader, whose persistent health woes are linked to 2018 stabbing, endorsed son to run in this year's election.

articles.title: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia F1 race cancellations confirmed due to Iran war
articles.summary: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia's Formula One Grands Prix races will not be held in April on safety grounds due to the war.

articles.title: Man City held at West Ham to lose ground on Premier League leaders Arsenal
articles.summary: Manchester City draw 1-1 with relegation-threatened West Ham to fall nine points behind Arsenal in Premier League race.

articles.title: Trinidad and Tobago extends state of emergency for another three months
articles.summary: The Caribbean nation has spent 10 of the last 14 months under an emergency status that curtails key civil liberties.

articles.title: Real Madrid beat Elche to pressure Barcelona for La Liga title
articles.summary: Federico Valverde scores his fifth goal in three games as Real Madrid beat Elche 4-1 to move one point behind Barcelona.

articles.title: US-Israeli strike kills 15 at Isfahan factory, Iranian media says
articles.summary: Iranian media report the deaths in central Iran as Tehran launches new missile salvoes at Israeli targets.

articles.title: Thousands in Madrid protest ‘forgotten’ Gaza, warn Iran war may spiral into
articles.summary: Thousands rallied in central Madrid calling for an end to the war involving the United States, Israel and Iran.

articles.title: Hundreds protest against US-Israeli strikes on Iran in Seoul
articles.summary: Hundreds of peace activists and demonstrators marched in central Seoul on Saturday in protest of the US-Israeli strikes.

articles.title: Three members of Iranian women’s football team pull Australia asylum bids
articles.summary: Seven members of the Iranian football delegation sought asylum, with four now known to have withdrawn applications.

articles.title: Arsenal beat Everton as Dowman makes Premier League history
articles.summary: Arsenal beat Everton 2-0 in a nervy match in the Premier League as they continue their pursuit of the title.

articles.title: Trump administration to drop charges against US veteran who burned flag
articles.summary: Veteran Jay Carey burned a US flag in protest of an executive order from Trump calling for prison terms for such acts.

articles.title: Turkey on alert as Iran conflict escalates, warns against provocations
articles.summary: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan says Ankara is monitoring the regional war involving Iran, the US, and Israel.

articles.title: UNESCO condemns strike on Minab girls’ school: ‘They attacked twice… How
articles.summary: Secretary of Iran’s National Commission for UNESCO, condemned a missile strike on a girls’ primary school in Minab.

articles.title: Six killed in attacks on Ukraine as EU extends sanctions against Russians
articles.summary: EU maintains pressure after slamming US for lifting sanctions on Russian oil exports as Middle East war bites.

articles.title: Trump administration threatens news outlets over critical coverage of Iran
articles.summary: FCC chair says news outlets that share 'distortions' about US war with Iran could lose their licences.

articles.title: Iranian woman explains ‘Allahu Akbar’ to Americans, amid explosion in Iran
articles.summary: Video shows an Iranian woman recording a message to Americans, amid an explosion in Iran.

articles.title: Israeli settlers shoot Palestinians in West Bank villages, steal livestock
articles.summary: One Palestinian reported killed in Qusra, as others injured in Rashayda, amid surge in Israeli settler violence.

articles.title: US embassy in Venezuela reopens as Trump pushes for access to resources
articles.summary: Trump administration has pressed the interim Venezuelan government for concessions on issues such as oil access.

articles.title: Iran warns UAE ports and ‘American hideouts’ are targets
articles.summary: An Iranian military spokesperson warned that ports, docks and “American hideouts” in the UAE could be targets.

articles.title: Is the world ignoring Gaza?
articles.summary: Amid the US and Israel's war on Iran, we discuss the impact on diplomatic efforts and support for Palestine.

articles.title: Protesters in Cuba attack Communist party office in rare riot over blackout
articles.summary: Anti-government protesters in Cuba sparked an outbreak of violence amid worsening blackouts and food shortages.
